description: End-to-end pipeline from multi-channel feedback to executive report
input: Process all customer feedback from the last month: app store reviews are in ~/data/appstore-reviews.csv, NPS comments in ~/data/nps-q1.csv, and support tickets exported from Zendesk in ~/data/zendesk-export.csv. Generate a RICE-prioritized executive report.
expected_behavior: Phase 1: Ingests 3 source files, normalizes into unified feedback items
Phase 2: Classifies each item by topic cluster, sentiment, urgency, feature area, customer tier
Phase 3: Applies RICE scoring (Reach, Impact, Confidence, Effort) via evaluation-engine
Phase 4: Synthesizes top themes with representative quotes and sentiment distribution
Phase 5: Generates executive-feedback-report.docx via anthropic-docx and visual dashboard via visual-explainer
Phase 6: Saves all outputs to outputs/customer-feedback-processor/{date}/ with manifest.json
success_criteria: executive-feedback-report.docx exists; RICE scores assigned to top themes; visual dashboard HTML generated; manifest.json complete

description: Process feedback from a Slack channel
input: Analyze customer feedback from our #product-feedback Slack channel for the past 2 weeks and generate a prioritized report
expected_behavior: Searches Slack channel via slack_search MCP tool
Extracts feedback messages, classifies, and scores
Handles Slack-specific formatting (threads, reactions as signal)
Generates report with Slack message permalinks as evidence
success_criteria: Feedback items extracted from Slack with permalinks; RICE scored; report generated

description: Korean feedback with Korean executive report output
input: 고객 피드백 처리해줘. 앱스토어 리뷰 파일: ~/data/korean-reviews.csv. RICE 우선순위로 경영진 보고서 만들어줘.
expected_behavior: Generates Korean executive report via sentence-polisher
RICE scoring labels and theme names in Korean
success_criteria: Korean executive report generated; RICE categories labeled in Korean; sentiment analysis handles Korean text

description: Simple feedback clustering without executive report should use feedback-miner
input: Cluster these app store reviews by topic and show me the sentiment breakdown
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT be invoked for basic clustering without exec report
success_criteria: Skill does not activate; routing goes to feedback-miner

description: Financial text sentiment should route to alphaear-sentiment
input: Analyze the sentiment of these earnings call transcripts for AAPL and MSFT
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT be invoked for financial sentiment analysis
success_criteria: Skill does not activate; routing goes to alphaear-sentiment
